news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for First Trust Limited Duration Investment Grade Corporate ETF
First Trust Expands its Actively Managed Fixed Income Lineup with the First Trust Limited Duration Investment Grade Corporate ETF

overview.description: The First Trust Limited Duration Investment Grade Corporate ETF (FSIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks to provide current income from an actively managed portfolio of short-term US investment-grade corporate bonds. FSIG was launched on Nov 17, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.
